data.body:
[Update Preview]

10/18 (Tue) Update's Joint Firing Drill is a new mode where Senseis will clear a set of practice 'projects' as quickly as possible.

The amount of tries per day is limited, so please strategize carefully which students to take with you! 

#BlueArchive![4yG72MRqt6T4iqQ9BphPpS4hmrppI1Sh.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/4yG72MRqt6T4iqQ9BphPpS4hmrppI1Sh.jpg)
